# Agentic Workspace local work thread

Ignored local-only continuation handle used to resume one actor's work without treating local cursor state as durable task, proof, or closure evidence.

- Source schema: `src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/local_work_thread.schema.json`
- Generated by: `scripts/generate/generate_schema_reference.py`

| `next_safe_action.selector` | string | no |  | Optional AW selector related to the resume route. |  |  |
| `local_notes` | string | no |  | Short advisory note; raw transcripts and durable policy text are not allowed. |  |  |
| `limits` | object | yes |  | Invariant flags that keep local work threads from becoming durable task or proof state. |  |  |
| `limits.local_only` | const `true` | yes |  | Thread records are only for the local workspace. |  |  |
| `limits.gitignored` | const `true` | yes |  | Thread records must remain under ignored local storage. |  |  |
| `limits.advisory` | const `true` | yes |  | Thread records are advisory hints, not durable authority. |  |  |
| `limits.not_closure_evidence` | const `true` | yes |  | Thread records cannot prove issue, PR, or plan closure. |  |  |
| `limits.no_raw_transcripts` | const `true` | yes |  | Thread records must not contain raw chat transcript content. |  |  |
| `limits.no_secrets` | const `true` | yes |  | Thread records must not contain secrets or authentication material. |  |  |
| `limits.no_priority_status_assignment` | const `true` | yes |  | Thread records must not introduce task-manager priority, status, owner, or assignment semantics. |  |  |
| `limits.durable_decisions_require_durable_source` | const `true` | yes |  | Durable decisions must be backed by durable sources outside this local record. |  |  |
